name: unset_interactive_defaults_to_channel
description: Unset route in a non-CI (interactive) context defaults to Channel — the v47-validated default, never a silent billing-sensitive print.

name: empty_string_interactive_defaults_to_channel
description: An explicitly empty/blank route string is treated as unset and defaults to Channel in an interactive context.

name: unset_ci_blocks_requires_explicit_route
description: Unset route in a CI/script context BLOCKS with an actionable error — CI must select a route explicitly rather than inherit the interactive Channel default. Blocked route carries no billing posture and (being a block) no sidecar_url/session_id.

name: whitespace_only_route_ci_blocks_requires_explicit_route
description: A whitespace-only route string is treated as unset; under CI it BLOCKS with ci_requires_explicit_route (not a Channel default). Covers the strip()-then-empty branch under CI that a TS port could diverge on.

name: ci_false_is_interactive_defaults_to_channel
description: CI set to a falsey literal (false) is not a CI context: unset route still defaults to Channel.

name: alias_channel_normalizes_to_claude_channel
description: The `channel` alias normalizes to the claude_channel route (explicit selection).

name: alias_claude_channel_canonical
description: The canonical `claude_channel` literal resolves to claude_channel.

name: alias_claude_dash_channel_normalizes
description: Hyphen/space separators normalize to underscores: `claude-channel` -> claude_channel.

name: channel_selection_carries_session_id_and_url_override
description: Selection OUTPUT (not build_launch_spec preflight): explicit channel populates session_id from PHASE_LOOP_CHANNEL_SESSION_ID and sidecar_url from the PHASE_LOOP_CLAUDE_CHANNEL_URL override (not the default loopback). Both env paths in one case.

name: alias_agent_view_normalizes
description: The `agent_view` alias normalizes to the claude_agent_view route. Agent View carries no channel sidecar_url/session_id.

name: alias_claude_agent_view_canonical
description: The canonical `claude_agent_view` literal resolves to claude_agent_view.

name: alias_print_normalizes_with_billing_warning
description: The `print` alias normalizes to claude_print — a billing-sensitive compatibility route. It is explicit operator/CI selection, records a billing warning, and is explicit_compatibility (never an automatic fallback). No channel sidecar_url/session_id.

name: alias_claude_print_canonical
description: The canonical `claude_print` literal resolves to claude_print with the same billing-sensitive posture and warning.

name: invalid_alias_blocks_with_invalid_route
description: An unsupported route literal BLOCKS with reason invalid_route and an error — never a silent print fallback. The nominal route attribute is claude_print but the blocked posture carries no billing spend and no sidecar_url/session_id.

name: explicit_arg_overrides_env_print_over_channel
description: Precedence: an explicit arg outranks PHASE_LOOP_CLAUDE_ROUTE. Arg=print wins over env=channel.

name: env_route_used_when_no_explicit_arg
description: Precedence: with no explicit arg, PHASE_LOOP_CLAUDE_ROUTE is consulted. env=agent_view resolves to claude_agent_view.

name: env_unset_with_other_env_present_defaults_to_channel
description: Precedence: a blank PHASE_LOOP_CLAUDE_ROUTE env with no arg falls through to the interactive default (Channel), not an error, when not in CI.
